description_long: This rifle features a compact, tactical design with a predominantly dark gray and black color scheme, accented by a white or light gray folding stock and barrel. The body is robust and angular, with a prominent cylindrical underbarrel attachment, likely a grenade launcher or similar device, mounted beneath the main barrel. The receiver is topped with simple iron sights, and the magazine appears to be integrated or internal, as no detachable box is visible. The grip is ergonomic and black, positioned just behind the trigger guard, and the folding stock is skeletonized for reduced weight and increased portability. The overall construction suggests a modern, urban combat firearm designed for versatility and maneuverability in close-quarters environments.
description: A compact, tactical rifle with a dark body, white folding stock, and an underbarrel attachment, featuring iron sights and an ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, underbarrel attachment, and iron sight alignment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the folding stock, underbarrel device, and the main receiver's angular design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the skeletonized folding stock and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the grip, trigger, and the full length of the underbarrel attachment.
